title: Per-cluster briefing (v10)
description: The central analytical artifact: per-cluster, per-outlet corpus assembled from a snapshot, written by core/briefing/build.py. v10 replaces v9's per-canonical-story briefings (keyed by story_key) with per-cluster briefings (keyed by lineage_id). Each cluster comes from HDBSCAN over the day's full article set; salience ranking picks the top ~15 for briefing. corpus[] order is the signal_text_idx contract — renaming or reordering silently breaks downstream LLM citation grounding.

lineage_id.description: Stable hash identifying the cluster lineage across days (e.g. Le4f8a39c1d). Persistent stories carry the same lineage_id day-over-day when the same articles re-cluster (≥30% Jaccard overlap).

cluster_id.description: Day-local cluster index from HDBSCAN. Reassigned every day; lineage_id is the cross-day stable identifier.

cluster_name.description: Human-readable cluster name. Written by Claude during the analyze step; null at briefing-build time.

salience_score.description: Cluster salience from core/cluster/salience.py — article_count × country_spread × (1 + lang_bonus) × stability.

top_tokens.description: Top 10 tokens across member article titles. Hint for naming + understanding the cluster.

n_articles_total.description: Total candidate articles in the cluster (pre per-outlet dedup).

signal_breakdown.description: Counts of corpus[] entries by signal_level.

corpus.description: Per-article entries. Position `i` is the signal_text_idx the LLM cites by — order matters and must be stable.

outlet.description: Outlet name (was `feed` in v9). The atomic identity unit in v10.

country.description: Country code (was `bucket` in v9). Now a tag, not an aggregation unit.

lean.description: Editorial-lean tag (e.g. 'Centre-right business', 'Public broadcaster — international'). Optional descriptor; empty string if unset.

coverage_caveats.description: Countries with zero items today due to feed failures. Used by Claude to distinguish structural silence (feed broke) from editorial silence (outlet chose different angle).
